---
title: "Welcome to Introduction to R Programming!"
---

## Course Information Summer 2025

<br>

**Meeting day and time**: Tue & Thur 1:00 - 2:30 PM

**Meeting location**: 

**Teaching staff**:
  * Instructor: Sabrina Nardin (she/her/hers) nardin@uchicago.edu
  * TA: Zach Meyer (he/him/his) zmeyer@uchicago.edu

**Office Hours**:
* After every class from 2:30 to 3:30 PM: Drop-in Office Hours with Sabrina for lecture or homework-related questions or any course related questions, no appointment needed. Zach will have drop-in office hour once a week. 

**Relevant Links**:
  * [R Workbench](https://macss-r.uchicago.edu/)
  * [Canvas]()
  * [Summer 2025 Course Schedule]()
    
<br>
